title: AgenticX AI Labs: Enterprise RAG, autonomous agents & production AI books.  | Product Hunt
excerpt: AgenticX bridges the gap between shallow AI demos and production-grade Architecture. Unlike generic prompt libraries, we deliver full enterprise RAG frameworks, autonomous multi-agent orchestration (LangGraph/MCP), and expert ebooks containing the exact production code needed to deploy scalable, model-agnostic AI with measurable business ROI
content_html: AgenticX bridges the gap between shallow AI demos and production-grade Architecture. Unlike generic prompt libraries, we deliver full enterprise RAG frameworks, autonomous multi-agent orchestration (LangGraph/MCP), and expert ebooks containing the exact production code needed to deploy scalable, model-agnostic AI with measurable business ROI

content_html_zh: AgenticX 弥合了浅层人工智能演示和生产级架构之间的差距。 与通用提示库不同，我们提供完整的企业 RAG 框架、自主多代理编排 (LangGraph/MCP) 以及专家电子书，其中包含部署可扩展、与模型无关的 AI 和可衡量的业务投资回报率所需的确切生产代码
